name: quasar
description: Local-first repository and search surface for AI agent sessions.

scripts.build: bun run --cwd packages/core build && bun run --cwd packages/cli build
scripts.typecheck: bun run --cwd packages/core typecheck && bun run --cwd packages/cli typecheck
scripts.test: bun run --cwd packages/core test && bun run --cwd packages/cli test && bun run test:convex
scripts.verify:static: bun run typecheck && bun run test && bun scripts/verify/convex-lint.ts
scripts.verify: bun run verify:static && bun run verify:live
scripts.deploy:local: bun scripts/init-local-convex.mjs && bun scripts/install-launchd.mjs && bun scripts/push-local-convex.mjs && bun scripts/sync-local-convex-env.mjs
scripts.release:check: bun run verify && bun run build && bun run build:npm-packages && bun run pack:dry-run && bun audit && publish-scan .
